entities.name: SWEET SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor L. Moench used for bio-ethanol, grain, and fodder production

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of grain produced by sweet sorghum

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of stover produced by sweet sorghum

entities.name: JUICE EXTRACT YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of juice extracted from stems for bio-ethanol distillation

entities.name: BAGASSE YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of bagasse produced from sweet sorghum

entities.name: BIO-ETHANOL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing bio-ethanol from sweet sorghum juice

entities.name: NITROGEN CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of nitrogen found in sweet sorghum stover

entities.name: IN VITRO DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: The measure of how well stover and bagasse are digested in a laboratory setting

entities.name: PALATABILITY
entities.description: The degree to which cattle find bagasse and stripped leaves acceptable to eat

entities.name: CATTLE
entities.description: Livestock used to evaluate the palatability of sorghum residues

entities.name: DISTILLERY RESIDUES
entities.description: The materials remaining after the distillation of bio-ethanol

entities.name: COMMERCIAL FEED BLOCK
entities.description: A processed feed product used for cattle nutrition

entities.name: SORGHUM STOVER
entities.description: Stover from non-sweet sorghum used as a traditional feed source

entities.name: DRY MATTER INTAKE
entities.description: The amount of dry feed consumed by bulls

entities.name: LIVE WEIGHT GAIN
entities.description: The increase in body weight of bulls during the feeding trial

entities.name: BULLS
entities.description: Male cattle used as subjects in the feeding trial
